libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure the generated native runtime test setup to pass `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` when running Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 on JDK 25/native image. Meaningful tests can use an in-process Vert.x `HttpServer` on localhost for WebClient GET/POST/forms/multipart/cookies/redirects/cache coverage; no external Docker service is normally needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If tests choose optional APIs such as `OAuth2WebClient`, they may require optional Vert.x auth dependencies, but those are not necessary for broad WebClient coverage.
Local Gradle and native-image verification remain authoritative; the system properties address the concrete Netty 4.2.x/JDK 25 native runtime risk.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is required for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but Vert.x 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final, which still needs explicit Unsafe/reflection system properties for Java 25 native-image runtime tests.
